# uapi_dhcp_dnsmasq (Data Source)

The global dnsmasq settings (uci dhcp.dnsmasq).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_dhcp_dnsmasq" "this" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `address` (List of String) Static DNS address overrides.
- `authoritative` (Boolean) Whether dnsmasq acts as the authoritative DHCP server.
- `boguspriv` (Boolean) Whether reverse lookups for private ranges are never forwarded.
- `cachesize` (String) DNS cache size.
- `domain` (String) Local DNS domain.
- `domainneeded` (Boolean) Whether plain names without a domain are never forwarded.
- `expandhosts` (Boolean) Whether the local domain is added to /etc/hosts names.
- `filterwin2k` (Boolean) Whether Windows DNS queries are filtered.
- `id` (String) Stable id of the dnsmasq section.
- `leasefile` (String) Path to the DHCP lease file.
- `local` (String) Local domain suffix served authoritatively.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
- `nonwildcard` (Boolean) Whether dnsmasq binds only to configured interfaces.
- `noresolv` (Boolean) Whether upstream resolvers are read from resolvfile.
- `port` (String) DNS service port.
- `readethers` (Boolean) Whether static leases are read from /etc/ethers.
- `rebind_protection` (Boolean) Whether DNS rebind protection is enabled.
- `resolvfile` (String) Path to the upstream resolver file.
- `server` (List of String) Upstream DNS servers.
